note: Single source of truth for README -> Test targets. Edit here, then run `node scripts/render-targets-readme.mjs --write`.

buckets.label: 0G App Suite
buckets.focus: Focus: onboarding, wallet connect, the core journey, and repeat-user behavior - stale sessions, captcha/token expiry, Chain ID switches, refresh/back-button interrupts.
buckets.notice: L0 Recruit is feedback-only: 0G Studio Feedback + 0G Private Computer Feedback, no bug required. From L1 upward, submit reproducible bugs through the GitHub defect form.

items.name: 0G App
items.desc: flagship app builder, live on mainnet
checklist: Refresh or return with the same wallet

items.name: Genome
items.desc: paste a URL/screenshot, produces production-grade design DNA
checklist: Submit one valid URL or screenshot
Refresh or retry after a completed run

items.name: 0G Chat
items.desc: end-to-end encrypted private chat (UI still WIP)
checklist: Send one test message without exposing secrets

items.name: PandaClaw
items.desc: agent launchpad + skill marketplace (Hermes + OpenClaw harness)
checklist: Walk one launch/configure flow until any confirmation boundary

buckets.label: 0G Infra
buckets.focus: Focus: correctness over polish - explorer data accuracy, RPC / Chain ID handling, and 0g-cc inference / storage paths. For bridge / swap / faucet / sign flows, stop at confirmation.

items.name: 0G Hub
checklist: Walk bridge/swap/faucet flow until confirmation screen
Check portfolio/balance display for obvious mismatch

items.name: 0G Storage Scan
checklist: Search or open a known storage item if available
Verify displayed metadata is internally consistent

items.name: Chain Scan
checklist: Check balance/tx metadata for obvious mismatch

items.name: 0G Code to Coin (0g-cc)
items.desc: official MCP server routing AI inference / fine-tuning / storage to 0G Compute; install with `npm install @0gfoundation/0g-cc`
items.note: `0g-cc` is a CLI / MCP server, not a web app. Add it (`claude mcp add 0g-cc npx @0gfoundation/0g-cc`), then walk one inference / storage flow plus one error path. The funds/keys boundary still applies.
checklist: Add it as an MCP server
Run one inference or storage flow
Trigger one error path such as missing key/network issue
Do not sign, send, launch, or trade

buckets.label: Ecosystem dApps
buckets.focus: Focus: load, connect a wallet on 0G, walk the main flow once, log obvious breakage. Don't deep-dive.

items.name: TradeGPT
checklist: Walk the main DEX flow until confirmation boundary
Report actionable bugs to the dApp channel
Log coverage in the Hub only
